title: Neon Paper Cranes
premise: In the floating city of Hoshima, memories can be folded into paper familiars. When whole neighborhoods begin forgetting the same night, a rooftop courier and a disgraced archivist must trace the missing memories before the city votes to erase its own past.

characters.name: Mina Kisaragi
characters.goal: restore the memories stolen from the Lantern District
characters.fear: becoming emotionally numb like her missing mother

characters.name: Ren Vale
characters.goal: prove the public archive was deliberately corrupted
characters.fear: trusting evidence that has been altered

characters.name: Sora Nami
characters.goal: win control of the courier routes before the monsoon season
characters.fear: being valued only as a replacement for an older sibling

characters.name: Doctor Ilya Mori
characters.goal: keep memory-folding technology out of military hands
characters.fear: admitting that her own research enabled the crisis

characters.name: Kaede Voss
characters.goal: erase the city's shared trauma to prevent another civil war
characters.fear: that people will always choose revenge when given the truth

characters.name: Pico
characters.goal: recover the voice sealed inside its paper body
characters.fear: unfolding into someone the team no longer recognizes
